## Feature

What should be added?

## User Workflow

Where does this fit in the user's production workflow?

## Module

Which module owns this feature?

## Dependencies

What other modules or decisions does this depend on?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] User workflow is clear
- [ ] Module ownership is clear
- [ ] Tests or verification plan are defined
- [ ] Documentation impact is checked
